name: Build New Capability
description: End-to-end workflow for designing, implementing, testing, and documenting a new RealAI capability.

steps.task: Design the architecture for the new capability: define the realai.py method signature, required provider delegation pattern, FastAPI endpoint contract, and any schema changes needed in realai_api/schemas.py.
Implement the new capability method in realai.py following the stub-with-graceful-fallback pattern. Wire it to the appropriate provider using PROVIDER_CONFIGS.
Add the FastAPI endpoint and Pydantic schema for the new capability in realai_api/app.py and realai_api/schemas.py. Ensure it delegates to the RealAI core.
Add a new panel or extend an existing panel in app/src/components/ to expose the new capability to users via the React frontend.
Review the new capability implementation for security issues: input validation, injection risks, sandboxing requirements, and authentication coverage.
Write plain-assert tests in test_realai.py covering the new capability method, its FastAPI endpoint, and error/fallback paths. Run python test_realai.py to confirm all tests pass.
Document the new capability in README.md and API.md. Add a runnable example to examples.py. Update the /v1/capabilities description if needed.
